summary: Completed testing of Menu Item Image Upload and Toggle Visibility features. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI components (Upload buttons, Toggle buttons, Show image toggle in modal) all functional. Fixed missing Vite proxy configuration for /api routes.

fixed_issues.issue: Missing proxy configuration for /api routes causing 404 errors on frontend API calls
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added proxy configuration in vite.config.mjs to forward /api requests to localhost:8001

passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin@jollys.com / Admin123!
Admin menu page loads at /admin-menu with menu items displayed
Each menu item row has an 'Upload' button (9 buttons found)
Each menu item row has an image visibility toggle with Eye/EyeOff icon (9 buttons found)
Toggle button click changes state from 'Visible' to 'Hidden' and back
Image column header present in admin menu table
Hidden file input present for image upload (data-testid='menu-image-file-input')
Add/Edit modal has 'Show image on menu' toggle (data-testid='show-image-toggle')
Backend: Upload endpoint rejects non-image files with 400 error
Backend: Upload endpoint requires admin authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Backend: Toggle endpoint requires admin authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Backend: Both endpoints return 404 for non-existent items
Backend: Menu items include show_image field in response
Public menu catalog at /menu-catalog loads correctly with images
seed_data_creation: None - used existing menu items for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu image upload and toggle visibility features fully implemented and tested. Vite proxy configuration was missing and has been added. All admin menu features working including: Upload button per row, Visible/Hidden toggle per row, Show image toggle in Add/Edit modal. Backend endpoints for upload-image and toggle-image are functional with proper authentication and validation.
